title: The CEO of Mullvad is the main financer of the far-right Swedish Örebro party
abstract: This CEO is the main financier of Sweden's far-right Örebro party, which means he might be sipping coffee next to a future political heavyweight. Quite a laugh-inducing situation!
abstract_zh: 你猜怎么着？这个CEO可是瑞典奥雷布罗右翼政党背后的大金主！这就意味着，下次他喝咖啡的时候，说不定旁边就是未来的执政党大佬呢。这事儿可真是让人笑掉大牙！
